headline: UK Regulator Mulls 10% Crypto Allocation For Retail Funds

article.title: UK financial regulator floats allowing 10% crypto allocations for retail funds
article.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority floated the idea of allowing limited exposure to crypto for retail-focused funds if it aligns with “disclosed investment objectives.”

headline: Humanity Protocol token plunges 85% after $30M hack

article.title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
article.summary: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.

article.title: Stocks Extend Rebound After AI Selloff, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Crude oil declined as tensions in the Middle East eased.

headline: Indonesia 5-Year Yield Spikes 10bps Amid Bond Selloff

article.title: Indonesia’s Bond Selloff Extends as Five-Year Note Yield Surges
article.summary: Indonesia’s bond market selloff deepened as the nation’s five-year note yield climbed to the highest level in more than six years.
